headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://www.gstatic.com https://www.google.com https://apis.google.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com wss://*.firebaseio.com https://*.cloudfunctions.net; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; frame-src https://www.google.com https://*.firebaseapp.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
